acceptance_criteria.title: Typing in search input shows matching posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the search page
When I type a keyword that matches post content
Then I should see matching posts in the results

acceptance_criteria.title: Search input is visible on search page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the search page
When the page loads
Then I should see a search input field

acceptance_criteria.title: Searching with no matches shows empty state message
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the search page
When I type a query that matches no posts
Then I should see a no results message

acceptance_criteria.title: Explore page shows trending tags
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the explore page
When the page loads
Then I should see trending tags

acceptance_criteria.title: Explore page shows suggested users
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the explore page
When the page loads
Then I should see suggested users

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking a tag filters the explore posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the explore page
When I click a tag chip
Then the posts section should filter to that tag

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking a suggested user navigates to their profile
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the explore page
When I click on a suggested user
Then I should be on that user's profile page

acceptance_criteria.title: Home feed shows posts with author and content
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When the page loads
Then I should see posts with author names and post content

acceptance_criteria.title: Home feed shows post timestamps
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When the page loads
Then I should see relative timestamps on posts

acceptance_criteria.title: Home feed shows like counts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When the page loads
Then I should see like counts on posts

acceptance_criteria.title: Like button toggles and updates count
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home page
When I click the like button on a post
Then the like count should increase by 1

acceptance_criteria.title: Bookmark button toggles on click
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home page
When I click the bookmark button on a post
Then the bookmark should become active

acceptance_criteria.title: Composer is visible on home page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When the page loads
Then I should see the post composer

acceptance_criteria.title: Submitting a post adds it to the feed
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home page
When I type a post and click the Post button
Then the new post should appear in the feed

acceptance_criteria.title: Submitting an empty post shows an error
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home page
When I click the Post button without typing anything
Then I should see an error message

acceptance_criteria.title: Load more button exists on home page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When the page loads
Then I should see a load more button

acceptance_criteria.title: Post detail page shows full post content
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When I click on a post
Then I should see the full post detail

title: See meta banner on every page

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner is visible on the home page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When the page loads
Then I should see the meta banner explaining this is a RootSpec demo

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner is visible on the explore page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the explore page
When the page loads
Then I should see the meta banner

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner is visible on the search page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the search page
When the page loads
Then I should see the meta banner

title: Navigate to seed and spec from banner

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner contains seed link
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on any page
When I look at the meta banner
Then I should see a link to view the seed

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner contains spec link
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on any page
When I look at the meta banner
Then I should see a link to view the spec

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner contains scaffold commit link
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on any page
When I look at the meta banner
Then I should see a link to the scaffold commit

acceptance_criteria.title: Profile page shows user display name and handle
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit a user profile page
When the page loads
Then I should see the user's display name and handle

acceptance_criteria.title: Profile page shows user posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit a user profile page
When the page loads
Then I should see posts by that user

acceptance_criteria.title: Unknown profile shows not found message
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit a profile page for a nonexistent handle
When the page loads
Then I should see a not found message

acceptance_criteria.title: Follow button appears on profile and toggles to following state
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit a user profile page
When I click the follow button
Then the button should show following state

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking following button unfollows the user
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am following a user on their profile page
When I click the following button
Then the button should revert to follow state

acceptance_criteria.title: Theme toggle button is visible in navigation
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When the page loads
Then I should see a theme toggle button in the navigation

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking theme toggle switches between light and dark mode
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home page in light mode
When I click the theme toggle
Then the page should switch to dark mode
